name: V2 - OneMap Enrichment - Property Registry Batch 10

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only for Module 2B batch test. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Select Eligible Registry Rows - Batch 10
nodes.notes: Filters eligible rows and returns up to 10 rows. Skips Matched, Needs Review, and No Match rows.

nodes.name: OneMap Search API
nodes.notes: OneMap API call. Select HTTP Header Auth credential with header name Authorization and the current OneMap token.

nodes.name: Prepare Batch Registry Updates
nodes.notes: Maps each OneMap response back to the matching selected row by item index, then prepares update rows.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key.

meta.description: Batch 10 OneMap enrichment workflow for Clarity V2 Property Registry.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Only external API call is OneMap Search API
Uses HTTP Header Auth credential placeholder; no token included in JSON
